title: Chapter 13
content:
Chapter 13

Slice.

Slice.

Slice.

With each strike of mine, scores of rats were split in half, and their body parts fell into the filthy sewer, making it filthier with their body parts.

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x137]

[You have gained 1370 EXP]

[You have gained an F rank mana crystal x137]

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x118]

[You have gained 11800 EXP]

[You have gained an E rank mana crystal x118]

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x13]

[You have gained 13000 EXP]

[You have gained a D rank mana crystal x13]

[EXP 1613\2600]

[You have leveled up x13]

[You have gained 65 stat points]

Haa…

Haa…

As much as I would have liked to continue today, I wasn’t in a condition to do so anymore. My health hadn’t taken a great hit, even with the number of rats, but my stamina wasn’t unlimited in the least. Even for me, four hours of hunting at my current stamina was too much.

Not to mention that, unlike yesterday, the giant rat didn’t show up as I was hoping. Killing D-rank ones was good luck, but there weren’t that many of them as well.

In the end, I had no other choice but to retreat.

I didn’t raise any of my stats because there was no need to. I would have to decide my physical stats once I got home. One thing was for sure: I would definitely be investing in stamina, even if I didn’t invest any in the rest.

Once I came out of the sewer, I didn’t go to the nice lady’s house because I was full of mana, and I had enough mana crystals on me to infinitely replenish my mana.

F-rank crystals replenished ten points of my mana.

E-rank ones restored a hundred, and D-rank ones restored a thousand points of mana.

Of course, it wasn’t as overpowered as anyone thought it was.

F-rank skills weren’t that powerful, and even they took at least a hundred points of mana to be used. E-rank ones took ten times more than that, and then the same pattern with the D-rank skills.

To just cast the highest grade fire attribute spell like [Meteor] or light attribute [Retribution], I would need at least a hundred million mana points. Even with my abilities, it was a skill I had to watch out for.

Using it more than once was impossible in close succession because mana would never replenish that fast, even with mana crystals or mana potions.

The more mana I have, the more time it would take to replenish.

Anyway, now that I had done most of the things, I used [Cleanse] twice. Once on me and the second time on my clothes.

That was the problem with skills. They could only be used once on a specific target. Going any further would be impossible. I mean, I couldn’t cast [Cleanse] on a certain area; I would have to use it on a specific target.

Anyway, I had sixty-five stat points from today’s hunt. It was enough of an amount to at least achieve an erection for a small period of time.

As I arrived home, Rayla was in the kitchen, preparing dinner, while there was no sign of anyone else in the house. Seeing that there was no one around meant they hadn’t returned from the hunt yet.

I also wanted to go on a hunt. I just hoped there were strong monsters out there in droves. Otherwise, the sewer was still my best bet.

I didn’t go to Rayla to have fun, but instead headed to the room upstairs and closed the door behind me.

[Stat points: 67]

I invested five each in my physical stats. I wasn’t paying any attention to charm yet because it wasn’t that much useful right now. Of course, charm had its own uses, but in fighting, it was mostly useless unless it was truly a high level of charm that could distract my opponent mid-fight.

[Strength: 20]

[Agility: 20]

[Stamina: 20]

As always, I felt a power surge flow through my entire body, leaving me with a feeling to do something other than just sit and do nothing.

Of course, I suppressed the urge and remained in my place. I then invested all fifty stat points in my intelligence at once.

A warm feeling passed over me as my heart began to beat at a peaceful rhythm. It may not have been as soft as the mana I was used to, but it was still mana.

The soothing feeling that washed over me was indescribable in simple words. It contained a feeling of calm and peace that washed my entire being, not just my heart and mind.

[Intelligence: 70]

I left the two points from yesterday just because I didn’t want to mess up the synergy of stats. Of course, my intelligence would never be in synergy with the rest of my stats, and as much as I wanted to invest them in my charm, it would be a useless thing to do so.

Such a small increase wouldn’t even affect normal people, let alone awakeners.

[Mana: 700]

Now the question of the hour was: would this much mana be enough for what I wanted to do?

Only one way to find out.

I closed my eyes and began to circulate the mana in my body to the groin area of my body. It wasn’t a difficult task at all, concentrating the circulation in just one place.

The hard part came next.

I began with the conception and the governor vessels because they were the easiest ones to construct, but also the most crucial to the construction of the rest of the vessels.

I began the work and after an hour of arduous effort, not to mention the amount of concentration and mana that went into this process, along with the care to make sure that nothing else went wrong.

Granted, mana wasn’t violent like Ki, and there was rarely any danger of damage, but the keyword ‘rarely’ still remained.

There was still a chance of damage, but it wasn’t anything I couldn’t avoid, given my experience.

[F rank mana crystals: -129]

I used a lot of F-rank mana crystals as well to replenish my mana again and again, but finally, after an hour of effort, I managed to achieve what I was trying to do.

[You have accomplished an impossible task for the world of Hesha]

[You have achieved a state of temporary completion]

[A reward would be granted for your achievement]

[All stats +5]

[An even greater reward awaits you if you were to figure out a permanent solution]

A surge of power went through my entire body, and the point it was concentrated at was none other than the approximately nine-inch pole in my pants.

Just the feeling brought a tear to my eyes, but I wasn’t distracted from the task at hand.

[You have obtained the state of ‘Completion’]

[Activation of the state would require 500 MP]

[The time limit of the said state would be five minutes]

[With each minute extension, 200 points of mana would be deducted]

[The maximum time limit for the state is ten minutes]

[Once the state ends, you cannot achieve it again for twenty-four hours]

[Depending on the user’s mental state, the time limit shall be lowered while the cost of the state activation and extension would remain the same]

I could guess what this state of completion was, but whatever it was or wasn’t, the fact that achieving a hard-on earned me a number of stats points was amazing.

Other than that, I didn’t need to use an hour to achieve a hard-on anymore because the system had recorded it. Now I just needed to activate using the cost of the state.

The cost, on the other hand, was a problem. There were too many points in this state that couldn’t be just ignored.

One, I would be the sole male in this world, probably, to achieve a hard-on or have an enlarged dick which wouldn’t fare well for me. An anomaly would be the correct word to use.

So I couldn’t remain hard all the time. Second, I would have to convince some people closer to me that this was a blessing, but it might also be seen as an evil thing and might land me in trouble, so I would appreciate it if they kept it to themselves.

Third, I could only achieve one hard-on per day. Once I canceled it, I would have to wait twenty-four hours before I could do so again.

And last but not least, the timing of the state.

Achieving the state would use 500 MP for five minutes, and after that, the longer I wanted to use that state, I would have to use 200 MP for every minute to a maximum of ten minutes.

Given that I now had 750 MP thanks to the recent achievement, I still could only go for six minutes. And then the matter of my mental pleasure also affected the time limit of the state.

All in all, this was a very tricky and, by all means, a very tedious solution. A lot of technicalities were involved, and no way in hell that was a long-term solution.

But the permanent solution was too far away for me to worry about it right now.

For now, I would have to be satisfied with the current circumstances and train myself to hold my brain so that I could enjoy this state to the maximum.

And now, let’s finally go and enjoy myself.
